note: Added #[derive(Zeroize)] to WgDevice (with #[zeroize(skip)] on non-secret fields, manual Drop calls self.zeroize()). Added #[derive(Zeroize, ZeroizeOnDrop)] to WgTunnel, WgPeerConfig, WgConfig (replacing manual Drop impls where applicable). Added #[derive(Zeroize)] to InterfaceSection, ConfigBuilder, PeerBuilder (no ZeroizeOnDrop since these are consumed via moves). All 443 lib tests + 26 zeroization integration tests pass.
